hero.badge: Idatha ibonisiwe • Ubulungisa bokubikezela • Ukuqinisekiswa kwe-Registry
hero.subtitle: Kusuka kwi {{suppliers}} idathabheyisi yomhlaba wonke—{{leads}} eziholwa ngemali, ukuhlaziywa okwenziwa yi-AI, kanye nedatha ehambisana nemigomo. Ikhwalithi phezu kwenani. Hlanganyela nabathengi abangaphezu kuka-50,000.
home.supplierNetwork.subtitleSuffix: ezizweni—ezidayiswe ngerejista, ezihambisana nemigomo, zilungele ukuhlaziya okujulile.
home.supplierRegions.title: Abahlinzeki Ngasemazweni
home.industries.title: 20+ Imboni. Ukonke KwezeMali Zempilo.
home.industries.subtitle: Kusuka emigodini nasekwakhiweni kuya kwezempilo nakwe-electronics—abathengisi abavunyelwe ngerejista, bokhonkolo bokuhweba kwemboni ne-B2B.
home.features.title: Yakhelwe izikhathi ezibalulekile ekuthengeni
home.features.subtitle: Akuyona idathabheyisi ejwayelekile yokuxhumana. Ukuhlakanipha okujule kwabathengisi, izindleko ezayezi, kanye nezikhumbuzo eziphezulu—zakhiwe ukuze zisetshenziswe emathimbeni okuthengwa, ezokusebenza, nasekuthengiseni.
home.showcase.title: Iziqubulo Zokwenziwa
home.showcase.subtitle: Ukubona okuphelele kwabathengisi, izindleko, nezingozi. Ama-rekodi {{suppliers}}—ahlala evuselelwa, anomphumela ophakeme, awusizi.
home.howItWorks.title: Kusukela Ekubhekaneni Kuya Ezinqumweni Ngemizuzu
home.howItWorks.subtitle: Izinyathelo ezintathu ezilula ukuze uthole indlela yokuthenga ephusile. Akukho ubunzima. Noma imiphumela.
home.step1.title: Sitshele Okudingayo
home.step1.desc: Faka umkhiqizo wakho, izincazelo, ivolumu, kanye nezindawo ozenzakalelayo. I-AI yethu iqonda kahle lokho ofuna ukukufunela.
home.step2.title: I-AI Iphatha Izinto Ezinkulu
home.step2.desc: Sihlanganisa igrafu ye-{{suppliers}} yezenzakalo zomhlaba, sithola izindleko ezizoqondile, futhi sihlola izingozi—ezidayiswe ngerejista, ezihambisana nemigomo.
home.step3.title: Yenza Izinqumo Eziqinile
home.step3.desc: Thola umbiko ophelele onezihlinzeki ezivunyelwe, izinkcazo zezimali, nemiyalo esebenzayo.
home.cta.title: Izinqumo Ezihlakaniphile Ziqala Lapha
home.cta.subtitle: Joyina othisha bokuthengwa abaphezulu kuka-50,000 abanqandekile, baphumelele futhi baqala ukuthola ngokuqiniseka.
home.cta.footer: Akukho khadi lesikweletu · Uhlelo lamahhala · Khansela noma nini
footer.tagline: Ukuhweba okukhiqizwa nge-AI kanye nolwazi lomsebenzi lwezithengisi ezikhethekile.
footer.designedFor: Abahlinzeki kuqala. Uhlanga lwezohwebo kuqala. Bakhiwe amaqembu okuthengwa.
home.feature1.title: Ulwazi Ngenhlangano
home.feature1.desc: Sebenzisa amarekhodi '{{suppliers}}' abahlinzeki kuzo zonke {{countries}}+ izindawo. Thola izingozi zezepolitiki, zezimali, nezokuphatha ngaphambi kokuba zithinte ibhizinisi lakho—ukubhekwa kwe-AI nokuxwayisa okufanele.
home.feature2.title: I-calculator yezindleko zokufika
home.feature2.desc: Thola izindleko zangempela kufaka phakathi izithuthi, impahla, ukuqinisekisa, nezinguquko zezimali. Ubunzulu bolwazi lwezohwebo, hhayi ukuqagela. Akukho zizathu eziphazamisayo.
home.feature3.title: Thola Izikhangiso Zabathengi & Ukuhweba
home.feature3.desc: {{leads}} izikhangiso zabathengi & zokuhweba—ziqoqwe nge-AI ngokugxila, ibhizinisi, nezimpawu zokuhweba. Akukhona ukuqhalaza nokuphosa. Idatha yekhwalithi, ehlaziyekile kumakhasimende okuthenga.
home.feature4.title: Ukuhlangabezana Kwenzelwe Kalula
home.feature4.desc: Ukuqinisekiswa okwakhiwe ngeregisteri, ukuhlola izitifiketi, nezinhlelo zokuhlola. Idatha efanelekile ukuze ugxile kulokho okubalulekile.
home.feature5.title: Idatha Yabahlinzeki Baphesheya
home.feature5.desc: Finyelela {{suppliers}} abahlinzeki abaqinisekisiwe nabathembekile ezweni {{countries}}. Hluza ngezimboni, izifunda, izitifiketi. Thola umphakathi wakho ngesikhathi.
home.feature6.title: Izingcezu Zokubika Ezisebenza Nge-AI
home.feature6.desc: Izingcezu eziphelele zokuthola ezine-analisi yemakethe, ukuqhathaniswa kwabahlinzeki, nezichazamazwi ezisebenzayo. Ubugqila bokuphathwa kwamabhizinisi kumakhasimende okuthenga.
home.industry1.title: Imayini & Imalishwa
home.industry1.desc: I-Antimony, ithini, lithium, cobalt, ikhopha, nezinsimbi ezikhanyisayo. Abahlinzeki bemalishwa abaqinisekisiwe bezinqubo eziyinqaba.
home.industry2.title: Ukukhiqiza & Ukuhweba
home.industry2.desc: Thola izinto ezisemqoka, izingxenye, neziyisebenziswayo ezivela kubakhiqizi abaqinisekisiwe emhlabeni jikelele.
home.industry3.title: I-Electronics & Ubuchwepheshe
home.industry3.desc: Thola abahlinzeki bezinto ezikagesi, abakhiqizi be-PCB, nabasabalalisi bezingxenye zobuchwepheshe.
home.industry4.title: Izimpahla Zokuthenga & Ukuhweba
home.industry4.desc: Xhuma nabahlinzeki bezimpahla zokupakisha, imikhiqizo eqediwe, neziphakamiso zakho zomkhiqizo.
home.industry5.title: Izimoto & Ukuhanjiswa
home.industry5.desc: Thola izingxenye zezimoto, izingxenye ze-OEM, neziyisebenziswayo zokuhanjiswa emhlabeni jikelele.
home.industry6.title: Ezempilo & Izinsiza Zokwelapha
home.industry6.desc: Thola abahlinzeki abahambelana ne-FDA bezokwelapha nezimpahla zempilo.
home.industry7.title: Ukuphakela & Izinto
home.industry7.desc: Thola izinto zokwakha, imishini enzima, nezinsiza zokwakha.
persona.procurers.headline: Nciphisa ubungozi. Thuthukisa imikhawulo. Gcina uhambisana.
persona.procurers.subline: Ukuqinisekisa abahlinzeki okwenziwa nge-AI, ukunemba kwezindleko eziphumayo, nokuhlola ukuhambisana kwezinsiza zokuthengwa.
persona.entrepreneurs.headline: Thola ngokushesha. Khulisa ngokuqonda. Qala masinyane.
persona.entrepreneurs.subline: Thola abahlinzeki abagunyaziwe emizuzwini, hhayi ezinyangeni. Amanani akhululekile kumabhizinisi amasha nemishini yokusebenza efanelekile.
persona.suppliers.headline: Tholwa. Win more RFQs.
persona.suppliers.subline: Joyina {{suppliers}} abahlinzeki abagunyaziwe. Thola ukucela kwabathengi okuhloniphekile futhi ukhule ibhizinisi lakho lokuthekelisa.
persona.producers.headline: Lawula izindleko. Qinisekisa ikhwalithi. Phumelela ezindaweni ezahlukeneyo.
persona.producers.subline: Ukuhlinzekwa kwezinto ezisemqoka, ukuhlolwa kwezindleko, kanye nokuhluka kwabahlinzeki kubaholi bokukhiqiza.
methodology.title: Indlela esiqinisekisa ngayo abahlinzeki
methodology.subtitle: Ukuhlonishwa kwendlela yethu kukhuthaza ukwethenjwa. Nansi indlela esiqinisekisa ngayo ubuqiniso bedatha.
methodology.step1.title: Ukuqoqa idatha
methodology.step1.desc: Siqoqe idatha yabahlinzeki emabhukwini ezohwebo, izitifiketi, kanye nemithombo yebhizinisi egunyaziwe. I-graph yomhlaba wonke ye-abahlinzeki ivuselelwa njalo.
methodology.step2.title: Ukuqinisekiswa
methodology.step2.desc: Kulowo nalowo abahlinzeki, kuhlolwa ama-akhawunti, ukujoliswa komlando wezohwebo, kanye nokuhlolwa kokuhambisana. I-Registry-eshayelwa, ikhwalithi yokuhambisana.
methodology.step3.title: Ukwahlula ikhwalithi
methodology.step3.desc: Ama-algorithms ethu anikela izilinganiso ezxhumene nezikhathi zokuphendula, izinga lesitifiketi, kanye nempendulo yabathengi. I-AI-ibalwe, impendulo ephakeme.
methodology.step4.title: Ukuhlolwa okuqhubekayo
methodology.step4.desc: Siqapha njalo izimpawu zobungozi futhi sishintsha isimo sabahlinzeki ngokuya ngedatha yansuku zonke. Ukuqinisekiswa, ubuchwepheshe obusekelwe ku-Registry.
integrationsPage.title: Xhuma i-SmartSeek ne-Stack Yakho
integrationsPage.subtitle: Hlukanisa abahlinzeki, i-RFQs, nezindleko eziphumayo nezinhlelo zakho zokuthengwa kanye ne-ERP. Ukuxhumana okukhululekile, i-API ephephile, kanye nezixhumi ezakhayo.
integrationsPage.supportedDesc: Xhuma amathuluzi akho okuthengwa. Idatha ihlale ihlukaniswe ngokuzenzakalelayo.
integrationsPage.step1Desc: Khetha i-SAP Ariba, i-Oracle, i-Salesforce, noma abanye ohlwini.
integrationsPage.step2Desc: Imigudu ye-OAuth 2.0—awunakufihla amaphasiwedi. Ukuxhumeka kwe-SSO kwezinkampani kuyasekelwa.
integrationsPage.step3Desc: Abahlinzeki, i-RFQs, nezindleko zedatha ziqhube phakathi kwezinhlelo ngasikhathi sinye.
integrationsPage.securityDesc: I-SOC 2 iqinisekisiwe. Idatha ifihliwe ngesikhathi sokuhamba nasesikhathini sokuphumula. Akukho amakhadi agcinwe.
home.trial.title: Qala Uhlolo Lwakho Lwamahhala
home.trial.footer: Akukho ikhadi lesikweletu • Imibiko emibili yamahhala • Ukufinyelela epulatifomu yonke
home.testimonials.title: Ethembiswe Ngabathengisi, Osomabhizinisi Nezithuthukisi
home.testimonials.subtitle: Imiphumela yangempela ezikhamiseni ezenze ushintsho ukuze zithole ukuhwebelana okunengqondo.
home.benefits.saveTitle: Londoloza Isikhathi Nezimali Kuwo Wonke Umsebenzi
home.benefits.saveDesc: Abasebenzisi be-SmartSeek babika ukuphuculwa okukhulu ekongeni izindleko, ukunciphisa ingcuphe, nasezinhlelweni zokuthola. Bheka umehluko kumibiko yakho yokuqala.
home.benefits.securityDesc: I-SmartSeek ihlangabezana namazinga aphezulu okuvikeleka nokuqinisekiswa, ngokuhambisana ne-SOC 2, ukuhlobisa idatha, namakontroli wokufinyelela aphathekayo.
home.benefits.encryption: Ukuhlobisa idatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuze kube sekupheleni
home.ready.title: Uziale Ukuthenga Ngokuhlakanipha?
home.ready.subtitle: Qala ukwenza izinqumo ezinhle zokuthenga namuhla. Akudingi ikhadi lesikweletu.
dashboard.subtitle: Ubuhlakani bokuthenga obuphakanyiswa i-AI ezandleni zakho.
dashboard.tryRefreshing: Ngiyacela ukuthi uzame ukuvuselela le ipheji.
auth.forgotDesc: Faka i-imeyili yakho bese sithumela isixhumanisi sokubuyisela
auth.tryAgainOrEmail: Sicela zama futhi noma sebenzisa imeyili/iphasiwedi.
auth.resetLinkSent: Uma i-akhawunti ikhona, sithumele i-link yokubuyisela.
auth.accountCreatedDesc: Wamukela ku-SmartSeek. Uthole amakhredithi ama-2 mahala.
auth.checkCredentials: Sicela qinisekisa iziqu zakho futhi zama futhi.
auth.validation.passwordLength: Iphasiwedi kumele ibe okungenani nezincwadi eziyi-6
home.testimonial1.quote: I-SmartSeek isehlisa isikhathi sokuhlola ababengamalungelo bethu ngama-60%. Ukuhlolwa kwezingozi okuqhutshwa yi-AI kusinika ukwethenjelwa kuzo zonke izinqumo zokuthola esizenzayo.
home.testimonial1.name: Sarah Chen
home.testimonial2.quote: Ikhadi lempahla eliphakanyisiwe lisivikele ezimangalisweni ezintathu ezibizayo kwinyanga edlule. Sekuyithuluzi eliyisisekelo eqenjini lethu lokuthola lemhlaba jikelele.
home.testimonial2.name: Marcus Weber
home.testimonial3.quote: Sathola ababengamalungelo aqinisekisiwe ezindaweni esingakaze sicabange ngazo ngaphambili. I-AI ye-SmartSeek inikeze idatha esiyidingayo ukuze sithuthukise ukuhwebelana kwethu.
home.testimonial3.name: Priya Sharma
home.testimonial3.role: Umgqibi Wokuthola Okuhlelekile, Atlas Retail Group
home.hero.subtitleBase: {{suppliers}} ababengamalungelo aqinisekisiwe emhlabeni jikelele, izindleko eziqondile, kanye nokuhlakanipha kwezingozi okuqhutshwa yi-AI - ukuze ithimba lakho lenze izinqumo ngempela
home.hero.painLine: Misa ukuthumela ama-imeyili abandayo. Misa ukukhetha izindleko. Misa ukujabuliswa emakhaya.
home.hero.searchPlaceholder: Zama: "umkhiqizi wezindwangu ze-cotton, Turkey" noma "amadivayisi, Vietnam"
home.hero.proofLine: Ukusesha okuphakathi kubuyisa {{matches}} abantu abaqinisekisiwe ngaphansi komzuzu
home.integrations.label: Uhlelo luhlanganisa nezinsiza ozisebenzisayo ithimba lakho lokuthenga
home.feat1.quote: "Sichitha amasonto amathathu sithumele ama-imeyili kubahlinzeki abangaphenduli — bese sithola nabanye abakhethiwe."
home.feat1.title: Thola abahlinzeki abaqinisekisiwe ngemizuzu
home.feat1.desc: Oxhumana nabo abaqinisekiswe uhulumeni phakathi kwabakhokhisi {{suppliers}}. Akudingi ama-imeyili aphukile. Akudingi imihlahlandlela efile.
home.feat2.quote: "Sihleli imali engu-$42k. I-invoyisi ithi $61k. Ukwahluka bekungamakhokhelo esingazazi ukuthi ekzist."
home.feat2.title: Bazi kahle intengo yakho yeqiniso ngaphambi kokuthi ubandakanye
home.feat2.desc: Amakhokhelo, ithrafikhi, uqinisekiso, izimali zokuthutha, VAT — kubalwa kusenesikhathi. Akukho mpuphu uma ithangi lifika.
home.feat3.quote: "Umhlinzeki wethu ophakeme wayesesifundeni esaba nokungazinzile. Asinasu lokubuyisela futhi lost 6 weeks of production."
home.feat3.title: Bheka ingozi yomhlinzeki ngaphambi kokuba ikuphoqe
home.feat3.desc: Amamaki obungozi be-AI kuzo zonke izinkampani nezindaweni. Iziqinisekiso zomhlaba. Izindlela ezahlukene zokuqashwa zitholakala ngokuzenzakalelayo.
home.pain.stat1desc: Isikhathi esivamile ithimba lokuthengwa esichitha ekuhloleni abahlinzeki ngesandla
home.pain.stat2desc: Ukuncipha kwemali okulinganiselwe unyaka nonyaka ngakunye ngenxa yamakhokhelo okuthenga afihliwe nezinketho ezingalungile zabahlinzeki
home.pain.stat3desc: Ukuncishiswa kwezindleko okuphakathi kokubikwa ngabasebenzisi be-SmartSeek ezinsukwini zabo zokuqala eziyi-90
home.pain.footnote: Abasebenzisi be-SmartSeek badlula ezamahora angu-14 zocwaningo lweviki bawa kwezingaphansi kwezingu-2. Lokhu kukhuphula amahora ayi-12 — njalo ngesonto.
home.hiw.title: Ukusuka kokusesha kuya ekwenzeni isivumelwano ezinsukwini — hhayi ezinyangweni
home.hiw.step1.title: Sesha
home.hiw.step1.desc: Faka umkhiqizo, impahla, noma imboni. Thola ukuhlinzekwa oku-200+ okuqhinisekisiwe ngokushesha — nezinhlobo zokuxhumana.
home.hiw.step2.title: Hlaziya
home.hiw.step2.desc: I-AI ihlola bonke abahlinzeki ngobungozi, ikhwalithi, nezindleko ezitholwayo. Qhathanisa amazwe nezindlela ngasikhathi sinye.
home.hiw.step3.title: Thenga
home.hiw.step3.desc: Thintana nabahlinzeki ngokuqondile, thumela i-RFQ, futhi uqhubeke — konke ngaphandle kokuphuma kuphrojekthi.
reportMock.supplierSubtitle: Wenzhou Neo Electric Co. — Chongqing, China
